com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.signature

Interface ExtESignature

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface ExtESignature
extends Module
    [External Module] Provides e-signature related functions.

    How to get this module:

         ExtSignature extSignature = (ExtSignature)ExtNSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.EXT_SIGNATURE);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void start(ExtESignatureParameters parameters, int timeout, ExtESignatureListener listener)
      Start electronic signature process.

    • Method Detail

      • start

        void start(ExtESignatureParameters parameters,
           int timeout,
           ExtESignatureListener listener)
    throws NSDKException
        Start electronic signature process.
        Parameters:
        parameters - [Required] The electronic signature relative parameters.
        timeout - [Required] Signature process timeout. Unit:seconds
        listener - [Required] The listener to receive the signature process result.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
